column1: # audio_envelope_profile.csv — recorded RMS-envelope telemetry for offline effect dev
#   The user's labeled "music / direct speech / further speech" profiling run.
#   This is the trace the tree-of-record SNS_RMS_FLOOR_MIN (20k) calibration came from.
# Domain : RMS in the 24-bit sample domain (rawI2S >> 8)
#          Full-scale reference RMS_FS = 200000 (the value that compands to byte 255).
#          To get a companded byte: round(sqrt(clamp(rms/200000
# Rate   : ~1 Hz. These are SERIAL STATUS SNAPSHOTS (one printed per second)
#          25 Hz / 40 ms packet envelope. Good for energy tiers & dynamic range; too
# Tiers  : silent room floor ~2000 (max ~2600); music body 16k-37k w/ transients to ~75k;
#          direct close speech peaks 92k-133k; loudest single window rms_max=140857 (no clip).
